# Natalia Ivakina Portfolio

Official portfolio of Natalia Ivakina, a Full Stack Developer based in Moncton, New Brunswick, Canada. Specializes in web and mobile application development, Shopify customization, and SEO optimization.

- **Primary Website:** [nataiva.com](https://nataiva.com/)

## Core Technologies

- **Frontend & Mobile:** React, Flutter, Angular, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS
- **Backend & Databases:** Node.js, Express, C#, SQL, MongoDB, MySQL, REST APIs
- **E-commerce:** Shopify, Liquid

## Featured Projects

### [Binary Cat Mobile App](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.binary_calc)
Educational Android application for practicing binary arithmetic.

### [Motion Designer Platform](https://akialex.com/)
Web application for managing motion design portfolios and videos.

### [Bedores Gallery](https://bedoresgallery.com/)
Custom Shopify art gallery platform.

### [Jewellery Art Website](https://ivamage.com/)
SEO-focused website for handcrafted crystal jewellery.

## Professional Expertise

- Full Stack & Frontend Development
- Mobile Application Development
- Shopify Theme Development & Customization
- REST API Development & Database Design
- UI/UX Development & Technical Documentation
- SEO Optimization
